panel.description: Automatic analysis with categories, habits, projections, and tips. Print or download the report as PDF with one click.
panel.printHint: You can also use Print and choose "Save as PDF" in your browser dialog.
panel.pdfGenerateError: Could not generate the PDF. Please try again.

context.title: Monthly context
context.overBudget: You are over budget this month. Consider slowing discretionary spending.
context.incomeUsed: You have used {{percent}}% of your income on expenses this month.

weekly.title: Weekly report
weekly.subtitle: Last 7 days · habits and spending pace

highlights.spentInPeriod: You spent {{amount}} in the last 7 days.
highlights.stable: Spending stable compared to the previous week.

habits.title: Detected habits
habits.spendingDown: Better spending control vs last week.
habits.noChanges: No significant habit changes this week.

debts.title: Debts
debts.totalBalance: Total balance: {{amount}}. Debt-free in ~{{months}} months (minimum payments only).

projection.title: Projection
projection.positivePace: Positive weekly pace: estimated savings of {{amount}} in the period.
projection.negativePace: Weekly pace consumes more than you earn in the period. Adjust spending or review your budget.

highlights.deficitWarning: You will close in deficit if you keep the current pace.

evolution.title: Trend
evolution.expensesUp: Expenses rose {{percent}}% vs the previous month (historical series).
evolution.expensesDown: Expenses fell {{percent}}% vs the previous month (historical series).
evolution.noComparison: Not enough data from the previous month to compare trends.
evolution.currentMonth: Current month in progress: income {{income}}, expenses {{expenses}}.

debts.title: Debts and projection
debts.debtToIncome: Total debt represents {{percent}}% of your monthly income.
debts.snowballPlan: Snowball plan: debt-free in {{months}} months paying minimums.
debts.monthEndProjection: Month-end projection: ~{{projected}} surplus if you keep the pace ({{daysRemaining}} days remaining).
